system.damage: smaller claw d12+3 (_reach_, _grabby_), bigger claw d12+5 with advan- tage (_reach_, _forceful_, _messy_, 3 piercing)
system.specialQuality: heals injuries in a few hours, regenerates limbs in a few days
system.moves:
- Poke its eyestalks out of the water or above grass
- Burst into view, making the mind reel with horror
- Scuttle back quickly, to escape danger or to drag off prey
- Spew forth a cloud of sickening, blinding, corrosive goo: d8 damage (area, close)

An enormous albino crayfish, older than the Fen itself. If you encounter it, pray it’s not hungry. But fat chance of that.
